title: Social Media Etiquette
description: Polite and effective communication online: tone, clarity, and respect.
summary_pt_br: Etiqueta online: não responda com raiva, leia antes de compartilhar, credite fontes, evite caixa alta.

scenes.subtitle_en: Polite and effective communication online: tone, clarity, and respect.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Etiqueta online: não responda com raiva, leia antes de compartilhar, credite fontes, evite caixa alta.

scenes.text_en: Polite and effective communication online: tone, clarity, and respect. Today's focus: social media etiquette. Never reply to a rude comment when you're angry.
scenes.text_pt: Etiqueta online: não responda com raiva, leia antes de compartilhar, credite fontes, evite caixa alta. Foco de hoje: social media etiquette. Nunca responda com raiva a um comentário rude.

scenes.title: Social Media Etiquette
scenes.body_en: Key ideas: Don't reply when angry. Read before you share. Credit original sources. Don't overpost. Avoid all-caps (it reads as shouting). Use emojis sparingly in professional contexts.
scenes.body_pt: Etiqueta online: não responda com raiva, leia antes de compartilhar, credite fontes, evite caixa alta.

examples.en: Never reply to a rude comment when you're angry.
examples.pt: Nunca responda com raiva a um comentário rude.

examples.en: Always credit the original source of what you share.
examples.pt: Sempre credite a fonte original do que compartilha.

examples.en: Avoid using all capital letters — it reads as shouting.
examples.pt: Evite caixa alta — parece que tá gritando.

exercise.question: Complete: "Never reply to a rude ___ when you're angry."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "Never reply to a rude comment when you're angry."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Nunca responda com raiva a um comentário rude.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: Always credit the original source of what you share.
I haven't heard anything about that.
exercise.explanation: The correct sentence is: "Always credit the original source of what you share."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Sempre credite a fonte original do que compartilha.

exercise.explanation: Five key terms from the lesson. Match each English word to its Portuguese meaning.

scenes.title: Social Media Etiquette — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre social media etiquette. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Maya, your online post got a lot of mean comments today.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I read them but I'm not replying yet.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I'll wait until tomorrow to respond calmly.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Will you delete the angry comments?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Only the ones that harass other users.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Should you block the repeat offenders?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Yes, blocking is kinder than arguing.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: What did you learn from this experience?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Read first, react never, post rarely.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: You are wise beyond your years, Maya.

scenes.title: Maya's online drama
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, detalhes e sua opinião. O professor vai ler e comentar.
scenes.prompt_en: Describe what happened and how Maya handled it. Include three principles of online etiquette.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Resumo curto com quem falou, o que disseram e sua opinião.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Maya's viral post had attracted hundreds of comments — some kind, many cruel, all loud.

paragraphs.speaker: Maya
paragraphs.en: I read them all twice before deciding not to reply in anger.

paragraphs.speaker: Friend
paragraphs.en: Couldn't you just delete the account and move on with your day?

paragraphs.speaker: Maya
paragraphs.en: Deleting would teach me nothing. Blocking the worst ones is enough.

paragraphs.speaker: Kumar
paragraphs.en: Silence is often louder than the cleverest reply you could ever post online.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Twelve hours later, Maya had not posted a word — and the storm was already passing.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the class just finished "Social Media Etiquette". Polite and effective communication online: tone, clarity, and respect. Never reply to a rude comment when you're angry. Always credit the original source of what you share. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that practice is the key — listen, read aloud, write your own examples. Every small step adds up.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is the key to learning?
check.explanation: Practice — listen, read aloud, write your own examples.
check.hint_pt_br: Prática: ouvir, ler em voz alta, escrever exemplos.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in class we studied "Social Media Etiquette". I liked it because it was clear and useful. See you next time!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
options: A grammar rule from last year
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala o título: "Social Media Etiquette".

scenes.title: Go deeper — free resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes gratuitas e confiáveis para continuar praticando. Salve os links e volte sempre.
